Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing Application For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Anthony Giles, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff,345 California L.P.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Ward Alan Emery Construction, Inc.,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Mmirabella Kamm is Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $396,693.78
Pre-Judgment Interest: $11,771.81
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $610
Total Judgment in the amount of $411,900.59
Judgment signed in open court.
